narrative:
Beavercreek 091 (precinct in Greene County) has 986 registered voters, with 50.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.5 percentage points.
